category_sources: source_facts.description says "Command-line tool (and API) for diffing Excel Workbooks"; official repository https://github.com/na-ka-na/ExcelCompare has the same project description.
display_name_sources: Official repository https://github.com/na-ka-na/ExcelCompare uses the project name ExcelCompare; source_facts.homepage points to that official repository.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README at https://github.com/na-ka-na/ExcelCompare is the primary official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/na-ka-na/ExcelCompare, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description explicitly identifies diffing Excel workbooks via command-line tool and API; source_facts.executables contains excel_cmp.
